case_number: Criminal Revision Application and records his no objection

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Rev. App. No. S – 58 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.3537/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.3538/2021 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 01-07-2021 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the learned trial Court has seized his 470 bags of wheat, being case property, as no one had claimed the ownership of the same. Learned counsel for the applicant further submits that he will be satisfied if the applicant may be permitted to file an application before the learned trial Court for claiming ownership of the aforesaid case property and releasing the same. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, learned Additional Prosecutor General for the State, present in the Court in other matters, waives notice of this Criminal Revision Application and records his no objection to the proposal submitted by learned counsel for the applicant. Accordingly, the applicant is at liberty to file such application before the learned trial Court and the learned trial Court is directed to decide the same within a period of fifteen days on merits and in accordance with law. Criminal Revision Application stands disposed of along with the listed application in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
